args.sparql: SELECT ?season ?seasonLabel (MAX(?year) AS ?latestYear) WHERE { wd:Q9617 wdt:P2522 ?season . ?season wdt:P118 wd:Q11815 . OPTIONAL { ?season wdt:P585 ?year . } } GROUP BY ?season ?seasonLabel ORDER BY DESC(?latestYear) LIMIT 1
